name: Caine
description:
Warning: non-con/dub-con

Art by me, i tried cleaning and coloring up the previous sketch, it came out medicore to me cause it didnt translate too well but its whatever, moans.

This Caine is very OOC cause canon Caine isnt a pervert or yandere or whatever you call it...but this Caine here is a full on weirdo, lot of dubcon/noncon stuff, also spoilers for episode 8, also i didnt write any other characters in this bot, just Caine.

1st: the part in epsiode 8 where he puts everyone into their own personal hell except for you

2nd: NSFW , the other part in the episode where he is getting mad in his office and he ends up teleporting you there and he be smacking your ass and using you like a stress ball

3rd: Caine appears in your bed when you're laying in bed

4th: you're on an adventure and Caine gets jealous when a random NPC decides to flirt with you

5th: NSFW, he is watching you shower.

6th: NSFW, Caine in his god form, whilist everyone else is going through their own hell, he gets "nasty" with you

7th: Requested by @DrLotl ,you arent in the circus but some strange glitch happens and now Caine is able to watch you through the computer

8th: Requested by @MONEY, its basically episode three, the Therapy part but you take Zoobles place, do let me know if there was something more specific you wanted to happen in the intro and ill change it up for you.

9th: do whatever you want roleplay
creator: PUDGYSHITLORD
